api.unknown: Something unexpected happened. Try again in a moment.
api.network: Cannot reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
api.account_not_activated: Your account isn’t activated yet. Click the link we sent by e-mail to activate it.
api.invalid_token: Invalid or expired link. Request a new one.
api.passkey_required: A passkey is required for this account.
api.second_factor_required: A second factor (TOTP or passkey) is required.
api.unauthenticated: You must be signed in to do this.
api.multi_factor_loss: Several factors were lost at once — contact the administrator.
api.backup_codes_unacknowledged: You must confirm you’ve saved your backup codes before continuing.
api.challenge_expired: Session expired. Start over from the beginning.
api.factor_not_required: This step isn’t required for this account.
api.totp_not_enabled: Two-factor authentication isn’t enabled on this account.
api.activation_failed: Activation failed. The link may be expired or already used.
api.email_send_failed: The e-mail couldn’t be sent. Try again in a moment.
api.email_taken: This e-mail address is already used by another account.
api.user_already_exists: An account already exists with this address.
api.bypass_already_active: A recovery request is already in progress for this account.
api.cannot_delete_self: You can’t delete your own admin account.
api.forbidden: You don’t have permission to do this.
api.guard_already_promoted: This record has already been validated — reload the page.
api.guard_mismatch: The data changed mid-flight. Reload the page.
api.missing_guard_params: Security parameters missing. Reload the page.
api.missing_sid: Module not configured for this account.
api.not_found_or_used: Link not found or already used.
api.not_an_image: The file isn’t a valid image.
api.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Wait a moment before trying again.
api.internal: Server error. Try again in a moment.
api.internal_error: Server error. Try again in a moment.

register.emailMismatch: The e-mail doesn’t match the invitation.

securityMode.totpRequired: Enable TOTP before choosing this mode.
securityMode.passkeyRequired: Enrol a PRF-capable passkey before choosing this mode.
securityMode.secondFactorRequired: Enable TOTP or enrol a passkey before choosing this mode.
